entity.name: Mattia Egloff
entity.description: Creator and lead developer of Vauchi, an open-source privacy-first contact exchange app. Building software that respects users by default — no tracking, no data harvesting, no ads.

projects.name: Vauchi
projects.description: Privacy-focused updatable contact cards via in-person QR exchange. Exchange contact info once, stay in sync forever. End-to-end encrypted with zero-knowledge relay, no accounts, no tracking. Cross-platform: iOS, Android, desktop, CLI.

channels.description: Recurring or one-time sponsorship via GitHub Sponsors

plans.name: Monthly support
plans.description: Help fund development, infrastructure, and security audits

plans.name: One-time donation
plans.description: Any amount helps — funds go toward relay hosting, testing devices, and security audits
